explanation: Using conservation of energy: $m_1 c_1(T_1 - T_f) = m_2 c_2(T_f - T_2) \Rightarrow (3.32)(900)(83 - T_f) = (0.82)(4186)(T_f - 16) \Rightarrow T_f \approx 76.59~^\circ\text{C}$.
